title: Hybrid Cloud and Multi-Cloud Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on complex cloud infrastructure designs.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of a 'Hybrid Cloud' environment?
options: Combining local and private infrastructure with a cloud-based platform as intended

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is 'Multi-Cloud' primarily used for?
options: Correctly using services—such as from AWS and Azure—together within a single application project
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories
